mood: Precise, technical, zero fluff, confident, direct

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Grid-based, intentional whitespace. Use wide gaps (gap-12, gap-16) and generous padding (py-24, py-32).
spacing_and_layout.containers: No cards. Use pure structural grids with 1px borders to separate content areas.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid border-[#222222]. Use border-t, border-b, or border-l to define sections instead of box backgrounds.

buttons.primary: bg-[#4A90D9] text-white rounded-none hover:bg-[#3A70B9] transition-colors py-3 px-6 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#4A90D9] text-[#4A90D9] rounded-none hover:bg-[#4A90D9]/10 transition-colors py-3 px-6 font-medium

components.inputs: w-full bg-transparent border-b border-[#333333] focus:border-b-2 focus:border-[#4A90D9] outline-none rounded-none px-0 py-3 text-white transition-all placeholder:text-[#666666]

motion.entrance: framer-motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}, animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}, transition={{ delay: 0.3, duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion.stagger: Use staggerChildren for grids and lists to sequentially fade up items.

sections_instructions.hero: Headline 'Engineering That Holds Up.'. Subheadline about mechanical engineering, CE marking, technical documentation, product development for industrial and maritime clients. CTAs: 'Discuss Your Project', 'Our Services'. Use the CSS grid texture background (NO IMAGE).
sections_instructions.services: Grid of 5 services (Mechanical Engineering & Design, CE Marking & Regulatory Compliance, Technical Documentation, Product Development & Prototyping, 3D Scanning & Reverse Engineering). 'What We Deliver'. Flat layout separated by 1px borders. No card UI.
sections_instructions.why_hultech: 5 differentiators. 'Built Different'. Minimal text, high contrast. Think technical specifications.
sections_instructions.about: 'About Hultech' - Sole proprietorship in Kristiansand. Clean typography, confident tone.
sections_instructions.contact: 'Let's Talk Engineering'. Minimalist form (Name, Company, Message). Use only bottom borders for inputs.
sections_instructions.footer: Large brand logo/text. Solid #0A0A0A background. 1px top border.

background_patterns.name: Geometric Blueprint Grid
background_patterns.usage: Use in Hero and Contact sections to mimic technical drawing.

image_urls.description: Use sparingly as a blend mode overlay if additional texture is needed for a specific block. DO NOT use as a standard image.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST update the tailwind config and index.css base variables to reflect the #0F0F0F background and #4A90D9 primary colors. Set root --radius to 0.
IMPORT Space Grotesk and Inter fonts via standard Google Fonts URL in index.html.
DO NOT use Shadcn Card component. It violates the 'no cards or boxes' rule.
Section dividers must be thin 1px lines (border-[#222222]).
No hero image. Only use the CSS-based grid line background.
Ensure the tone is confident, direct, technical, like a Kongsberg subsidiary.
